top3.sql:
SELECT first_name, last_name
FROM member
WHERE member_id = (
    SELECT link_to_member
    FROM income
    ORDER BY date_received ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT first_name || ' ' || last_name AS full_name
FROM member
JOIN income ON member.member_id = income.link_to_member
WHERE income.date_received = (
    SELECT MIN(date_received)
    FROM income
)
LIMIT 1;

ORDER BY i.date_received ASC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT first_name, last_name
FROM member
WHERE member_id = (
    SELECT link_to_member
    FROM income
    ORDER BY date_received ASC
    LIMIT 1
);
